File Controller Module¶

File I/O controller module.

Responsible for loading game data from external files, such as maps, configuration, and saved state.

class controller.file_controller.FileController[source]¶

Bases: object

Handles file-based operations for the game.

Available supports:

  • Loading map data from JSON files

static get_maps_json()[source]¶

Load map data from JSON file.

Returns:

Parsed JSON data from data/maps.json

Return type:

dict | list

RPG Game
